revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ru:Спорительница хлебов]]


 

[[File:Sporitelnitsa hlebov Seraphim-Diveyev Monastery.jpg|thumb]]'''Conqueror of Breads''' is a {{ill|Marian apparition|simple|12=|13=|qq=}}<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|last=Scott |title=October 28: what a holiday today, signs and what not to do - Global Happenings |url=https://globalhappenings.com/opinion/29349.html |access-date=2023-10-21 |website=globalhappenings.com |language=en-US|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book |last=Afanasyev |first=Monk Lazar |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=gK10EAAAQBAJ&dq=%E2%80%9CThe+Conqueror+of+Breads%E2%80%9D&pg=PA200 |title=Stories from the past of Optina |publisher=Vladimir Djambov |language=en|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book |last=Pavlova |first=Nina |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Ja9cEAAAQBAJ&dq=%E2%80%9CThe+Conqueror+of+Breads%E2%80%9D&pg=PA274 |title=RED PASCHA |date=2021-04-24 |publisher=Vladimir Djambov |language=en|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=Former schema-hegumen Sergiy told about bribes of millions of dollars for the refusing of the Tax payer ID |url=https://en.newizv.ru/news/2021-02-18/former-schema-hegumen-sergiy-told-about-bribes-of-millions-of-dollars-for-the-refusing-of-the-tax-payer-id-388596 |access-date=2023-10-21 |website=en.newizv.ru |language=ru|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |date=2023-05-12 |title=How to distinguish a real icon from a fake: attention to detail |url=https://generico.ru/2023/05/12/how-to-distinguish-a-real-icon-from-a-fake-attention-to-detail/ |access-date=2023-10-21 |language=en-US|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |title=How to pray at night correctly. Night prayer and how I lost it |url=https://uofa.ru/en/kak-pravilno-molitsya-nochyu-nochnaya-molitva-i-kak-ya-ee/ |access-date=2023-10-21 |website=uofa.ru|qq=}}</ref> also known as Our Lady "The Grower of Crops".
Her feast day is {{ill|October 28|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 28|qq=|qid=Q2952|1=October 28}}.<ref name=":0" />
==Overview==
'''Sporitelnitsa Khlebov Icon of the Mother of God''' (Икона Божией Матери «Спорительница хлебов») — a venerated {{ill|miraculous icon|ru|чудотворная икона|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q4517704|1=Miraculous icon}} of the {{ill|Mother of God|ru|Богородица|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q345|1=Mary, mother of Jesus}}, honored in the {{ill|Russian Orthodox Church|ru|РПЦ|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q60995|1=Russian Orthodox Church}}. The icon’s feast day is {{СС|28|October||15|qq=}}.
The icon depicts the Mother of God seated on clouds, her hands extended in blessing over a field with sheaves and flowers. It was painted in 1890, a year of famine in Kaluga Governorate, at the blessing of {{ill|Ambrose of Optina|ru|Амвросий Оптинский|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q2260415|1=Ambrose of Optina}}<ref name="Shchennikova"/>.
== History ==
The creation of the icon was conceived by Ambrose of Optina in his final years, as he prayed for the protection of {{ill|Shamordino Convent|ru|Шамординский монастырь|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q4519900|1=Shamordino Convent}}. The design was based on a landscape near the convent, which he personally sketched. The icon was painted by Hieromonk Daniil, the brother of Abbess Sophia of the Shamordino Convent, and a skilled academic painter<ref name="Shchennikova"/>.
The image, portraying the Mother of God on clouds in a naturalistic style, was inspired by the icon of “All Saints” from the {{ill|All-Saints Convent|ru|Богородичный Всехсвятский женский монастырь (Болхов)|12=|13=|qq=}}. Below, it shows a rye field stretching into the distance<ref name="Shchennikova"/>.
=== Beginning of Veneration ===
In autumn 1890, Abbess Ilaria of the Bolkhov Convent brought the icon to {{ill|Optina Pustyn|ru|Оптина Пустынь|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q1225920|1=Optina Monastery}}, where it was immediately venerated. Copies were distributed to famine-stricken areas. In 1891, during a famine, prayers before the icon brought a good harvest<ref name="Shchennikova"/>.
=== Attempted Ban ===
After Ambrose's death, the Consistory sought to suppress the icon's veneration. In 1892, the {{ill|Holy Synod|ru|Святейший Правительствующий Синод|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q4988896|1=Holy Synod of the Russian Orthodox Church}} ordered the icon’s transfer to the cathedral sacristy and banned its reproduction. Despite this, its popularity grew, and by 1918, the icon inspired poems by {{ill|Vyacheslav Ivanov (poet)|ru|Иванов, Вячеслав Иванович|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q361318|1=Vyacheslav Ivanov (poet)}}<ref name="Minakov"/>.
=== Inclusion in the Church Calendar ===
In 1993, Patriarch {{ill|Alexy II|ru|Алексий II|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q151040|1=Patriarch Alexy II of Moscow}} approved the feast day, which was included in the Church calendar from 1995<ref name="Minakov"/>.
== Veneration ==
Faithful pray before the icon for agricultural abundance and relief from famine. The icon’s Akathist, approved for liturgical use in 2020, praises the Mother of God for her blessings on the harvest<ref>{{cite web|title=Akathist for the Icon 'Sporitelnitsa Khlebov'|url=http://www.patriarchia.ru/db/text/5664322.html|website=Patriarchia.ru|accessdate=2020-07-18|qq=}}</ref>.
== Opinions ==
The theologian {{ill|Pavel Florensky|ru|Флоренский, Павел Александрович|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q336769|1=Pavel Florensky}} criticized the icon’s naturalistic style, likening it to the image of {{ill|Demeter|ru|Деметра|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q40730|1=Demeter}}, the mother of grain<ref>''Florensky P. A.'' *Iconostasis* — М.: Искусство, 1994.</ref>.

== See Also ==
* {{ill|Inexhaustible Chalice|ru|Неувядаемый Цвет|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q4317979|1=Unfading Flower}}
* {{ill|Graceful Sky|ru|Благодатное Небо|12=|13=|qq=|qid=Q4087860|1=Our Lady Beneficial Sky}}
== References ==
{{примечания|qq=}}
== Literature ==
* {{книга|автор=Евстигнеев А. А.|заглавие=100 чудотворных икон|место=М.|издательство=ОЛМА Медиа Групп|год=2011|страниц=120|qq=}}
* {{книга|автор=Капица Ф. С.|заглавие=Славянские традиционные верования|место=М.|издательство=Флинта|год=2011|страниц=296|qq=}}
==See Also==

* {{ill|Holy Virgin Mary of Seven Swords|ru|Семистрельная икона|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Holy Virgin Mary of Seven Swords|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Our Lady Beneficial Sky|ru|Благодатное Небо|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Our Lady Beneficial Sky|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Softening of Evil Hearts|ru|Умягчение злых сердец|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Softening of Evil Hearts|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Succor in Travail|ru|Поможение родам|every|8=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Succor in Travail|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Unfading Flower|lt=Unfading Flower|ru|Неувядаемый_Цвет|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unfading Flower|qq=}}
